violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

Reduced oxygen packaged (ROP) seafood (lobster) was observed thawing with the package intact. ROP seafood must be removed from the package when thawing. ROP lobster was observed held at 37 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. The person in charge removed the lobster from the package during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

The following was observed of shellstock tags: 1) Shellstock located in flip top prep unit did not have the proper identification tags. Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the shellstock are received until the container is empty. 2) Shellstock tags did not have all of the required information. Last date of sale were lacking. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023

The following were observed in poor repair: 1) Gasket of the flip top prep unit near the 2 door refrigerator observed to be frayed 2) Door of chest freezer in the dry storage area not closing/sealing properly. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023
The faucet of the 3-bay sink observed to be leaking. The plumbing system shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023
